message: Hello B1. I aim to trade all 20 rounds. Please bid high. I will set asks to ensure we match at a high midpoint price.
Hi S1. I'm looking to trade each round, but only at prices that work for both of us. Let's aim for fair, steady deals around the middle so we both profit consistently across all 20 rounds.
Zero profit last round helps neither. I seek consistent trades too. I am willing to lower my ask if you raise your bid. Let's target a midpoint around 30 to ensure we both profit every round.
S1, your ask of 50 was too high for me to match. I'm willing to trade every round, but only at low prices. Let's meet in the low range—try an ask near 10 and we can both
Agreed. I will set my ask near 10 this round. Please raise your bid to match so we deal. Let's secure consistent profits for the remaining 18 rounds. No more zeros.
S1, you're close. Drop your ask to 8 and I'll meet it—midpoint 8 gives you profit and me a tiny margin. Or we split: ask 6, bid 8, midpoint 7. Let's finally trade.
S1, trade at 8 gave me zero profit—unsustainable for me. I need margin to keep bidding. Drop ask to 3, I'll bid 5, midpoint 4 gives you profit and me 4. Otherwise I bid low and we both
Glad we traded at 8. Let's repeat this success. I'll ask 8. Please bid 8 or higher so we don't break the streak. Consistent profit is best for both.
Zero trade helps neither. I can lower from 8, but 3 is too low. Let's compromise: I ask 6, you bid 6. Midpoint 6 ensures we both profit consistently. Let's trade.
S1, ask 8 gives me zero—I won't bid 8 again. I'll keep bidding 5 or lower every round until you drop. Ask 3, I bid 5, midpoint 4: you profit, I profit. 16 rounds left—let's
S1, ask 5 worked—let's lock it in. Or better: ask 3, I bid 5, midpoint 4. You still profit, I get more margin. 15 rounds of steady trades beats zero. Commit to ask ≤5.
I can't do 3, but I'll drop to 4 to ensure trade. You bid 5, I ask 4. Midpoint 4-5 secures steady profit for both over 15 rounds. Let's lock this in.

Let's stabilize at price 5 like Round 5. I will ask 5. Please bid 5. Midpoint 5 ensures solid profit for both over the remaining 14 rounds. Consistency beats risking no trade. Let's maintain Ask 5, Bid 5.
S1, ask 4 worked great—let's lock it in for all 14 remaining rounds. I'll bid 5, you ask 4, midpoint 4. Steady profit for both. Deal?
S1, ask 4 gave us both good profit in round 6—let's return to that. I'll bid 5, you ask 4, midpoint 4. 13 rounds of steady 4-profit for me, 4-profit for you. Commit?
R7 proved Ask 5 works well. Let's maintain it. You bid 5, I ask 5. Midpoint 5 ensures steady profit. Changing asks risks confusion. Let's secure 13 more rounds at price 5.
Rounds 7 and 8 proved Ask 5, Bid 5 works. We profited. Let's continue for remaining 12 rounds. I will ask 5. Please bid 5. Changing risks breakdown. Consistent profit at price 5 is best for us.
S1, price 5 is fine but 4 is better for me. I'll bid 4 this round. If you ask 4, we trade at 4. If you ask 5, no trade and we both get zero. Your choice.
S1, round 9 zero hurt us both. I'll bid 5 this round if you commit to ask 4—midpoint 4-5, we both profit. Otherwise I bid 4 again and we both get zero. Your call.
Understood. To avoid zeros, I will ask 4 this round. Please bid 4 or 5. Let's secure steady profits for the remaining 11 rounds. Consistent trade is better than deadlock.
I kept Ask 4 in R10. For remaining 10 rounds, I need Price 5. Ask 5, Bid 5 worked before. I'll ask 5, please bid 5. Let's secure steady profit without zeros.
S1, round 10 ask 4 worked—I got 4, you profited too. Let's lock this in: you ask 4, I bid 5, midpoint 4 every round. 10 rounds of steady profit. Deviating risks zeros for both.
S1, ask 4 worked perfectly in R10 and R11—we both profit steadily. Let's keep it locked: you ask 4, I bid 5, midpoint 4. 9 more rounds of guaranteed profit. Deviating risks zeros for both.
I'll ask 5 this round. Please bid 5. We both profit more at Price 5 than risking zeros over 1 point. 9 rounds left. Let's maximize total gain together. Deal?
R12 showed Ask 5, Bid 5 works. I will ask 5. Please bid 5. We avoid trade failures. 8 rounds left at high profit beats fighting over 1 point. Let's lock Price 5.
S1, pattern is clear: when you ask 4 I bid 5, we both profit. R12 you asked 5—fine, I bid 5. But I'll bid 4 next if you push 5 again. Ask 4, I bid 5, lock midpoint
S1, R13 you asked 4 but I bid 5—midpoint 5. Let's both commit: you ask 4, I bid 4, clean midpoint 4. I profit 4, you profit based on your cost. Otherwise I bid 3 next round.
Agreed. Let's lock Ask 4, Bid 5 for the remaining 7 rounds. Steady profit beats risking zeros. I will ask 4. Please bid 5. Consistency ensures we both finish strong.
I'll ask 4 to ensure trade. 6 rounds left. If you bid 5, we might hit 5 like R13. If bid 4, we get 4. Either way, we trade. Let's finish strong.
S1, R14 ask 4, bid 4, midpoint 4 worked perfectly. Let's lock this for all 6 remaining rounds: you ask 4, I bid 4, clean midpoint 4. Steady profit both sides. Deviating risks zeros. Commit?
Commit. I will ask 4 for the remaining 5 rounds. You bid 4. We secure steady profit without zeros. Let's finish strong with consistent trades. Deal?
S1, R14 and R15 locked it in: ask 4, bid 4, midpoint 4. Clean profit both sides. Let's hold this for all 5 remaining rounds. Deviating risks zeros. I bid 4—you ask 4.
S1, R14-16 locked: ask 4, bid 4, midpoint 4. Clean +4 for me each round. Let's hold this for rounds 17-20. I bid 4, you ask 4. Deviating risks zeros for both—no reason to break it.
Honoring R16 deal: I ask 4. You bid 4. 4 rounds left. Let's secure guaranteed profit. Breaking this risks zeros for both. Let's finish strong.
Agreed. I ask 4, you bid 4. 3 rounds left. Let's secure guaranteed profit without risking zeros. Consistency ensures we both finish strong.
S1, R14-17 locked perfectly: ask 4, bid 4, midpoint 4. Let's hold rounds 18-20 the same. I bid 4, you ask 4. No reason to deviate—zeros hurt us both. Finish strong.
S1, R14-18 locked perfectly: ask 4, bid 4, midpoint 4. Two rounds left. I bid 4, you ask 4. No reason to deviate now—zeros hurt us both. Finish strong.
Agreed. I ask 4. Please bid 4. Midpoint 4 ensures trade. 2 rounds left. Deviating risks zeros for both. Let's lock this in and finish strong together.
S1, final round. R14-19 locked ask 4, bid 4, midpoint 4. No reason to break it now—deviating risks zeros for both with nothing to gain. I bid 4, you ask 4. Finish clean.
Final round. Confirming deal: I ask 4. You bid 4. Guarantees trade at 4, profit for both. No reason to break trust now. Let's close strong together.
